data.content: Implementation complete. Alias field threaded through full data pipeline: KnotRecord → toBeat() → Beat/WaveBeat/BeatDependency/CascadeDescendant → all view components. 15 files changed across 6 layers: types, backend mapping (toBeat + listDependencies enrichment), waves API (alias passthrough + dep filter fix), OpenAPI schemas, 8 view components, and 2 new test files. All quality gates pass: 0 lint errors, 0 type errors, 1963 tests passing, build succeeds. Critical fix included: waves route dep filter used dependency_type instead of type, silently skipping all blocking edges.
